successor_hypothesis: a fixed-length positionwise evidence-citation mask can remove the v1 out-of-range sparse-index provenance failure without changing Support semantics
single_intended_experimental_change: replace model-generated sparse cited_evidence_indices with a fixed-length binary evidence_citation_mask that the adapter deterministically maps to immutable evidence IDs
nonsemantic_instrumentation_correction: propagate already-computed provider envelope/content/model hashes into any post-parse contract failure artifact
